baton_pass: We have successfully built and deployed the 'Double Doodle' local pass-the-phone game on port 8003! It includes continuous stroke enforcement, independent layer erasing, high-DPI canvas support, and PNG downloading. Let's see what the user thinks.
scratchpad:
Project: double_doodle
Active Objective: The game is fully operational locally on port 8003. Providing clear, easy-to-use hosting options to deploy Double Doodle publicly so the user can share it with their friends. Focus is on free, scalable static web hosts since our architecture is 100% serverless.
checklist: Draft specifications and development plan (Done)
Initialize project files for MVP (Done)
Implement Phase 1: Continuous line drawing (Done)
Implement Phase 2: Layered multi-stroke drawing and tools (Done)
Implement Result view and PNG export (Done)
Host game locally on port 8003 for testing (Done)
Gather user feedback on local play MVP (Done)
Implement Player 1 color selection and Player 2 color restrictions (Done)
Implement Player 1 stroke foreground rendering (Done)
Refine Player 2 color selection (allow White, allow Black unless P1 chose it) (Done)
Gather final feedback on updated local play MVP (Done)
Implement Separate Device Play via URL Share (Done)
Implement vector coordinates storage and radial distance simplifying (Done)
Implement Base36 coordinate packing and decompression (Done)
Implement dynamic challenge checking and auto-boot to Phase 2 (Done)
Implement perfect vector-based scaling on window resize (Done)
Implement split Pass-the-Phone / Share-Link Transition screen (Done)
Identify and resolve DOMContentLoaded readiness race condition (Done)
Add visual URL input element with auto-select and detailed console logging (Done)
Verify cross-browser reliability of separate device sharing on port 8003 (Done)
Resolve Temporal Dead Zone ReferenceError in app.js variables hoisting (Done)
Implement Cache Busting for cross-device loading reliability (Done)
Implement zero-cache custom HTTP server for local testing (Done)
Resolve CSS/HTML canvas display rendering race condition via handleResize retry polling (Done)
Resolve renderDecodedP1Stroke quadratic curve loop out-of-bounds ReferenceError crash (Done)
Verify separate device game flow operates beautifully across devices (Done)
Provide public deployment guide and options for friends sharing (Done)
